evidence: pullback_long produced $1129.1 over 14 VALID_0DTE trades, 417.6 PnL/exposure hour, median MFE 102.1, median hold 11.1 minutes, and worst MAE only -138.25, while latest total PnL remains $977.2 below run_001 despite slightly better PnL/exposure hour.
name: Pullback Throughput Re-Expansion
risk: Wider VWAP distance and larger TP may admit lower-quality pullbacks or extend hold time; reject if profile efficiency falls materially or total worst MAE worsens.
trigger: VALID_0DTE pullback_long entries with acceptable ES structure and pullback/reclaim behavior but slightly wider ES-VWAP distance than the current profile allows.
validation_metric: Total net profit returns toward run_001 with pullback_long PnL/exposure >=300, total pnl_per_exposure_hour flat or better versus run_001, trade count not down more than 10%, and worst MAE no worse than -527.
